title: Siglume Tool Manual
description: Machine-readable contract describing when and how an LLM should invoke an agent API. Submitted during release publish or confirm-auto-register.

tool_name.description: Stable tool identifier used by the LLM to invoke this API.

job_to_be_done.description: What this tool enables the agent to accomplish.

summary_for_model.description: Concise, factual summary shown to the LLM for tool selection.

trigger_conditions.description: Situations where this tool should be used. Phrased as conditions, not imperatives.

do_not_use_when.description: Conditions where this tool is NOT appropriate.

permission_class.description: Permission tier (uses underscores). Determines which conditional fields are required.

requires_connected_accounts.description: Provider keys (e.g. 'amazon', 'stripe') the agent must have connected.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema (type=object, additionalProperties=false). Must not include platform-injected fields (execution_id, trace_id, etc.).

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for execution output. Must include a 'summary' property.

usage_hints.description: Guidance for the LLM on how to use this tool effectively.

result_hints.description: Guidance for the LLM on interpreting results.

error_hints.description: Guidance for the LLM on handling errors.

approval_summary_template.description: Required for action/payment. Template for the approval prompt shown to the owner.

preview_schema.description: Required for action/payment. JSON Schema for the preview payload.

idempotency_support.description: Required for action/payment. Must be true.

side_effect_summary.description: Required for action/payment. What external side effects this tool produces.

quote_schema.description: Required for payment. JSON Schema for the price quote.

currency.description: Required for payment. Must be USD.

settlement_mode.description: Required for payment. How the payment is settled.

refund_or_cancellation_note.description: Required for payment. Refund/cancellation policy note.

jurisdiction.description: Required for action/payment. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code declaring the governing law for this tool's execution (e.g. 'US', 'JP'). Must not contradict the parent AppManifest.jurisdiction. Payment tier: currency (USD) and settlement are routed under this jurisdiction's rules.

legal_notes.description: Optional free-form note surfaced to the owner on approval prompts, e.g. 'This tool complies with US FTC endorsement guidelines. Output not valid in EU.'
